name: Seed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the egg, butter, and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the milk and dry ingredients alternately to the mixture.
3. Bake in a moderate oven at 350°F. If using a shallow pan, it will take about half an hour; if using a loaf pan, bake longer.
4. Test with a straw to ensure doneness.
5. Serves about 8.
